completed_work: Extended SELF_MODEL.json with warrants, warrant_counts, and admitted_plans.
key_decisions: Do not use context admission for PLAN approval; use WARRANT records for self-model adjudication.
PLAN-20260705-0001 is now admitted by WARR-20260705-0001 for read-only L0 candidate diagnostics only.
next_actions: Implement the admitted PLAN-20260705-0001 read-only L0 candidate diagnostic as the next governed improvement slice.
risks: WARRANT records currently admit plans but do not automatically update PLAN status from proposed to admitted.
summary_text: WARRANT records are implemented for self-model adjudication and PLAN admission. The failed attempt to admit PLAN-20260705-0001 through context admission exposed the design boundary: context admission decides what enters context packs, while WARRANT records approve or reject claims, plans, and governed actions. The self-model layer now validates WARRANT records, includes scripts/write_warrant_record.py, includes seed WARR-20260705-0001 admitting PLAN-20260705-0001, and aggregates warrants, warrant_counts, and admitted_plans into SELF_MODEL.json. The warrant_counts bug was fixed by counting warrant_state rather than status. Focused self-model tests passed with 26 tests and the full suite passed with 295 tests before commit 7b60e67.
